beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: You're back! And you've got my axe!

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: Thank you. Seriously. I was trying to act brave about it, but I hated the thought of leaving it out there.

beats.speaker: MC
beats.text: You said there was a room?

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: Right! A deal is a deal. The room is yours for as long as you need it.

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: Get some rest. You look like the forest tried to chew you up and changed its mind.

beats.speaker: Lyra
beats.text: We'll talk more tomorrow. For now, don't make Sera chase me down for letting you overdo it.
